Ordered coffee for pick up. Store took my order. Went to pick up and was rudely kicked out by a film crew that they were closed. Talked to the barista and he was very unhelpful and rude. Wouldn't cancel my order and now I don't get a refund. I liked the is place because it was close to work and usually are friendly but this is ridiculous. Coworker picked up a different coffee order 20 minutes prior. Staff was dismissive and very unhelpful. The film crew was very rude.
The coffee is bitter and  so is the staff.  Terrible service that I do not recommend. AVOID AT ALL COSTS.  There are plenty of other places to choose from.

I was in SF in July and had heard about this place. I ordered the coffee and I have to say, that it was the worst cup of coffee I have ever tasted! It was absolutely vile  and disgusting. I had to throw it away!
